overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dystopian urban environment at night. The player moves through neon-lit covered walkways, past commercial signs, and approaches a large statue in a plaza. The atmosphere is dark and cyberpunk-themed with vivid pink, red, and purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with neon ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, observing the neon-lit surroundings

entered.detail: large curved transparent ceiling structure with metal framework
rows of rectangular fluorescent light panels embedded in the ceiling
vivid pink neon light strips arranged in geometric patterns on the ceiling
illuminated signage for a food establishment with neon lighting
weathered concrete walkway with visible seams and stains

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered urban arcade at night, characterized by a curved glass ceiling with grid-patterned fluorescent lights and vivid pink neon strips. The environment is empty of people, with a sushi shop visible on the right side. The concrete pavement shows signs of wear and urban decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corner with 24-hour laundry and bright red neon signage

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from pink to intense red as the camera approaches the neon-signed corner

agents.ego_description: approaching a corner with bright red neon signs, observing a crouching figure near a storage container

notable_agents.action: person crouching beside a white storage container, appearing to search through items

entered.detail: bright red neon sign indicating 24-hour service
large white industrial container on the sidewalk
colorful neon sign for a laundry service with circular design
short flight of concrete steps leading to an elevated entrance

segments.scene_description: The player turns a corner into a narrower commercial area dominated by intense red neon lighting from a 24-hour sign and a laundry service. A crouching figure is seen near a white storage container. The pink neon lights of the previous arcade fade from view as the red-lit corner becomes the focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled transition area under highway overpass

events.description: exiting the enclosed neon-lit corner into a darker, open area with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: navigating through a darker, debris-strewn area with abandoned vehicles visible to the left

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
derelict red car parked among debris
scattered trash and rubble covering the ground surface
faint blue neon glow visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the red-lit commercial corner into a darker transitional zone beneath a highway overpass. The area is littered with debris and features abandoned vehicles. The lighting becomes significantly darker, with only distant neon glows and ambient city light providing illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with monumental statue and highway overpass

events.description: emerging into an open plaza dominated by a massive female statue with outstretched arms

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the large statue, observing the surrounding plaza and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away from the camera toward the underpass

entered.detail: monumental bronze statue of a woman with arms outstretched, standing on a pedestal
elevated concrete highway structure with vehicles visible above
red neon sign reading 'HAVE COOKIES' on a building facade
distant futuristic skyscrapers visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a dramatic open plaza featuring a towering female statue with outstretched arms. The scene is framed by a highway overpass and distant skyscrapers. A 'HAVE COOKIES' neon sign glows on the left. The camera circles the statue, revealing the scale of the monument and the urban landscape beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with purple overhead lighting

events.description: entering a dark corridor illuminated by purple neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: entering a narrow dark corridor, approaching a figure standing in the distance

notable_agents.action: figure standing still in the corridor, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: long rectangular purple neon light fixtures running along the ceiling
closed metal security shutters on shop fronts
tight concrete walls enclosing the passage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, dark service corridor illuminated by purple neon ceiling lights. The space is enclosed with metal roll shutters on the right. A lone figure stands in the distance as the camera moves deeper into the corridor, leaving the open plaza and statue behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city, transitioning from a neon-lit arcade into a dark urban underbelly before opening into a monumental plaza. It begins by moving through a covered urban arcade under a curved glass ceiling with pink neon strips and a sushi shop, before turning a corner into a narrower commercial area dominated by intense red neon signs and a crouching figure. The scene then shifts into a darker transitional zone beneath a highway overpass littered with debris and abandoned vehicles, where the vivid colors fade into ambient city light. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment expands into a dramatic open plaza featuring a towering female statue and a glowing cookies sign, before finally turning away from the monument to enter a narrow service corridor illuminated by purple neon ceiling lights.
